text:
There was once a young boy named Oliver who lived on a farm with his widowed mother. Oliver loved animals more than anything else in the world. Every day after school, he would hurry home, eager to spend time with his fluffy yellow kitten, Mittens.

Oliver wanted nothing more than to become a veterinarian someday. Every time he saw a sick animal, he dreamed of healing them.

One evening, while his mother was preparing dinner, Oliver noticed a hurt raccoon wandering around the barn. It had a deep wound on its leg. Oliver noticed how sad the creature seemed, perhaps injured in a fight.

Oliver decided he would help. That night, he climbed up into the barn rooftop on a rope he had made. He bandaged Mittens' paw.

The next day, Oliver visited the raccoon. It looked up at him with big, wise eyes. Oliver smiled.

"This hurts," Mittens said softly.

He gently cleaned the wound and applied a kind of patch he had
